title: clinopodium gilliesii
intro: Clinopodium gilliesii, also known as the Argentine savory, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Clinopodium gilliesii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and even help to lower blood pressure. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of the plant are used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
